name: rad-code-review
description: 3-role adversarial code review with diff-aware scoping and AI slop detection. Catches what AI wrote badly and only flags what you changed. Covers security (OWASP + framework-specific IDOR), architecture, AI slop detection (14 patterns), performance profiling heuristics, UX/accessibility (WCAG 2.2 + dynamic ARIA state), and release readiness with severity-ranked findings. Includes a code-reviewer agent for proactive review after significant implementation work.
